features: Premium Metal Construction: Seashell hair clip crafted with premium metal featuring unique seashell and starfish design, a must-have hair accessory that combines functionality and sophistication

Multiple Size Options: Starfish clips available in 3 different sizes measuring 9.5 cm / 3.74 in and 10.5 cm / 4.13 in, conch hair clips ensure your hairstyle stays intact all day, suitable for updos, half-up styles, ponytails, or loose hair accents
Versatile Occasion Wear: Conch hair clips are suitable for holidays, beach parties, birthdays, or romantic dates, this sea shell hair clip is versatile, chic, and timeless
Elegant Vintage Design: Pearl headpiece for women blending vintage charm with modern trends, this fancy clip makes an excellent gift for your friend, mom, or daughter
Secure Hold for All Hair Types: Beach hair barrettes designed for durability and style, securely holding thick or medium hair while adding a touch of fashionable elegance to any look
